examples: I was heartsick, for I felt that the splendid years of my carefree childhood had come to an end.
Heartsick mood, break out at this time.
Have you heard of a person being heartsick?
Ms. MICHELE DETTWEILER: I'm just heartsick today that we conservatives didn't rally around him sooner.
